description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones featuring a broad, padded headband with a glossy brown finish and two large, circular ear cups. The ear cups are encased in black cushioning material, likely synthetic leather or foam, for comfort during extended use. The headband is connected to the ear cups via black, rectangular plastic or metal joints, providing structural support and adjustability. The exterior of the ear cups has a metallic brown sheen, matching the headband, and the overall design is both modern and utilitarian. There are no visible wires, suggesting a wireless design, and no branding or control buttons are apparent on the visible surfaces. The headphones are compact and portable, suitable for personal audio use in urban environments.
description: A pair of over-ear headphones with a glossy brown headband and black cushioned ear cups, featuring a modern, wireless design.
description_view_0: Front view showing both ear cups and the full arch of the glossy brown headband.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the width and shine of the headband and the circular profile of one ear cup.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the ear cups and the continuous curve of the headband.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the other ear cup and the headband's glossy finish.
